questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using interprocess communication in multi-threaded programming?
Which of the following is a type of interprocess communication that allows two or more processes to communicate with each other by sending messages?
What is the primary purpose of a semaphore in interprocess communication?
options: To synchronize access to a shared resource
questions.explanation: To synchronize access to a shared resource
